granularity_note: DSE Chemistry is a course-and-assessment guide, not a short syllabus. The skill package should use strand/skill/objective/topic granularity rather than forcing a rigid traditional content topic tree. Mandatory topics are stable enough to act as topic containers; electives are choice-based and should be tagged accordingly.

topics_assessment_split_recommendation.topics_json: Mandatory Topics 1-12 and Elective Topics 13-15 as strand/topic containers with scope/out_of_scope and skill links.
topics_assessment_split_recommendation.assessment_json: Paper structure, weightings, assessment objectives, question styles, difficulty ladder, SBA rules, grading.
topics_assessment_split_recommendation.references: Experimental techniques, STSE links, teaching guidance remain as reference only.

known_limitations: Page numbers are approximate rendered PDF pages; exact line-level offsets are not captured.
No dual-pass OCR or rendered-page verification was performed for every high-impact page.
The 2018 update may not reflect very recent HKEAA exam-rule changes after 2020; exam rules should be cross-checked against the latest HKEAA assessment framework.
